goals.description: Submit the assignment now to definitively close the loop with the professor and remove the source of potential friction.
goals.rationale: The deadline looms, but my primary driver is preserving the relationship status quo. Submitting immediately acts as a preemptive strike against any possibility of awkwardness or perceived negligence. By finalizing this task right now, I can ensure that when I meet the professor later, there is no lingering tension or unbalanced energy exchange. It feels safer to end the obligation cleanly than to risk it dragging into our time together.

Completing it fully at this moment could introduce minor friction; better to leave it until after the social interaction when my mood will be lighter and the stakes are lower.
